title: European stocks rebound as investors await key inflation data; Abivax shares tumble
summary: European stocks are rebounding as investors await key inflation data that could shed light on economic impacts of U.S.-Iran tensions. French biotech Abivax shares are tumbling amid this market uncertainty. The mixed movements reflect investor caution balancing positive equity sentiment against geopolitical concerns.
content: Investors are awaiting data that will shed further light on the economic impact of the U.S.-Iran war.

zh.title: 欧洲股市反弹，投资者静待关键通胀数据；Abivax股价暴跌
zh.summary: 欧洲股市正在反弹，投资者静待关键通胀数据，这可能会阐明美伊紧张局势对经济的影响。法国生物技术公司Abivax在市场不确定性中股价暴跌。这些混合波动反映了投资者在积极股票情绪与地缘政治风险之间寻求平衡的谨慎态度。

title: Biotech takeover target Abivax sinks over 30% after bowel disease drug trial update
summary: French biotech Abivax experienced a significant 32% share price decline following updated trial data on its lead bowel disease drug. The sharp drop suggests the trial update may have missed investor expectations or revealed efficacy concerns. This decline jeopardizes the company's status as a potential takeover target.
content: Shares of French biotech Abivax tumbled 32% after it reported fresh data on its lead asset.

zh.title: 生物技术并购目标Abivax在肠道疾病药物试验更新后下跌超过30%
zh.summary: 法国生物技术公司Abivax因其主导肠道疾病药物的试验数据更新而经历了显著的32%股价下跌。急剧下跌表明该试验更新可能未达到投资者预期或揭示了疗效问题。这一跌幅危及该公司作为潜在并购目标的地位。

title: Steph Curry signs with Chinese brand after Under Armour split
summary: NBA star Stephen Curry has signed a partnership with Chinese sportswear brand Li-Ning following his split with Under Armour. The deal reflects Chinese companies' strategic push to build global brand presence through partnerships with prominent athletes. This move marks a significant shift in Curry's endorsement portfolio and signals Li-Ning's international ambitions.
content: Chinese firms have been vying to secure deals with big stars as they push to become global brands.

zh.title: 库里与安德玛分手后与中国品牌签约
zh.summary: NBA球星斯蒂芬·库里在与安德玛分手后与中国运动品牌李宁签署了合作协议。这笔交易反映了中国公司通过与著名运动员的合作来建立全球品牌影响力的战略努力。这一举动标志着库里代言组合的重大转变，也表明了李宁的国际野心。

title: Amazon's four-day Prime Day event starts June 23, as shoppers battle inflation
summary: Amazon is launching its four-day Prime Day sale starting June 23, coinciding with record-low U.S. consumer sentiment in May. The retail event targets cost-conscious shoppers grappling with inflation and reduced purchasing power. This timing reflects retailers' efforts to stimulate spending amid economic headwinds.
content: Amazon's four-day shopping fest comes after U.S. consumer sentiment dropped in May to a record low.

zh.title: 亚马逊四天Prime Day活动6月23日启动，购物者与通货膨胀作对
zh.summary: 亚马逊将从6月23日启动为期四天的Prime Day促销，与美国5月创纪录低迷的消费者情绪相吻合。该零售活动针对在通货膨胀和购买力下降中苦苦挣扎的成本意识购物者。这个时机反映了零售商在经济逆风中刺激支出的努力。

title: Trump administration proposes 25% tariff on Brazilian goods over unfair trade practices
summary: The Trump administration has proposed a 25% tariff on Brazilian goods under Section 301 investigation authority, citing unfair trade practices. U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer initiated the proposal at President Trump's direction. The move escalates trade tensions and could significantly impact bilateral trade relations.
content: U.S Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said that the investigation under Section 301 was launched at the direction of U.S. President Donald Trump.

zh.title: 特朗普政府因不公平贸易做法对巴西商品征收25%关税
zh.summary: 特朗普政府根据第301条调查权对巴西商品提议征收25%关税，理由是不公平的贸易做法。美国贸易代表詹姆森·格里尔按照特朗普总统的指示提出了这项提议。此举升级了贸易紧张局势，可能会对双边贸易关系产生重大影响。

title: London Tube strikes go ahead after talks fail
summary: London Underground workers represented by the RMT union are striking on Tuesday over working hours disputes after negotiations failed. Additional strike action is scheduled for Thursday, signaling continued labor tensions. The strikes will severely disrupt London's public transportation system.
content: Members of the RMT union are on strike on Tuesday in a row over working hours, with further action planned for Thursday.

zh.title: 谈判失败后伦敦地铁罢工继续进行
zh.summary: 由英铁路、海事和运输工会（RMT）代表的伦敦地铁工人周二因工作时间纠纷罢工，谈判失败。周四还安排了额外的罢工行动，表明劳动紧张局势持续。这些罢工将严重中断伦敦的公共交通系统。

title: Blackstone closes its largest Asia private equity fund at over $13 billion
summary: Blackstone has closed its largest Asia-focused private equity fund with $13.1 billion in commitments, exceeding the firm's previous regional fundraising records. The substantial fund size reflects strong institutional investor appetite for Asian private equity opportunities. This achievement underscores Blackstone's dominant position in the region's private equity market.
content: Blackstone raised $13.1 billion for its latest Asia private equity vehicle, marking the largest private equity fundraise the firm has done in the region.

zh.title: 黑石集团亚洲私募股权基金融资超130亿美元创历史纪录
zh.summary: 黑石集团宣布其亚洲最大私募股权基金成功收盘，承诺资金超过131亿美元，刷新公司在该地区的融资纪录。该基金规模的扩大反映了机构投资者对亚洲私募股权机会的强劲需求。这一成就凸显了黑石集团在该地区私募股权市场中的主导地位。

title: NBA star Stephen Curry partners with Chinese sportswear giant Li-Ning
summary: NBA star Stephen Curry has partnered with Chinese sportswear giant Li-Ning for product development and sports culture initiatives. The partnership extends beyond merchandise to include broader sports culture engagement as Li-Ning pursues global expansion. Curry will serve as a key ambassador for the Chinese brand's international growth.
content: Stephen Curry has entered into a partnership with Li-Ning, which would involve product development as well as sports culture initiatives.

zh.title: NBA明星库里与中国运动品牌李宁达成合作
zh.summary: NBA明星斯蒂芬·库里已与中国运动品牌巨头李宁达成合作，共同开发产品和推进体育文化计划。该合作不仅限于商品销售，还包括更广泛的体育文化参与，李宁借此推进全球扩张。库里将成为这个中国品牌国际增长的关键大使。

title: Blue Origin launchpad damaged in rocket explosion may not be restored until 2028, NASA's Isaacman says
summary: Blue Origin's launchpad was damaged in a rocket explosion and may not be operational until 2028, affecting NASA's Artemis program which relies on the company for multiple contracts. This delay could significantly impact the timeline for the agency's return-to-the-moon efforts.
content: NASA has tapped Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin for several contracts in the agency's Artemis return-to-the-moon program.

zh.title: Blue Origin发射台在火箭爆炸中受损，可能要到2028年才能修复，NASA的Isaacman说
zh.summary: Blue Origin的发射台在火箭爆炸中受损，可能要到2028年才能投入使用，这将影响NASA的阿尔忒弥斯项目，该项目依赖该公司进行多个合同。这一延迟可能会严重影响该机构重返月球努力的时间表。

title: HPE’s stock soars toward record gain as earnings show a networking bonanza
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise's stock is approaching record highs driven by strong earnings results. The company is benefiting from intense demand for networking equipment and servers fueled by AI infrastructure buildout.
content: The artificial-intelligence buildout is driving intense demand for networking and servers, and Hewlett Packard Enterprise is reaping the rewards.

zh.title: 随着财报显示网络产品销售旺盛，HPE股价飙升至历史高位
zh.summary: 惠普企业公司的股票因强劲的财报结果而接近历史高位。该公司正从AI基础设施建设带来的网络设备和服务器强劲需求中受益。

title: Alphabet asks shareholders to foot an $80 billion bill for AI expansion
summary: Alphabet is raising $80 billion through a stock offering to fund AI expansion, with Berkshire Hathaway participating with a $10 billion investment. This represents a major capital commitment to AI infrastructure and development.
content: Berkshire Hathaway is buying Alphabet’s stock at a discount as part of a newly announced equity offering.

zh.title: Alphabet要求股东为80亿美元的AI扩张买单
zh.summary: Alphabet通过股票发行筹集80亿美元来资助AI扩张，其中伯克希尔哈撒韦公司参与投资10亿美元。这代表了对AI基础设施和开发的重大资本承诺。

title: Asia-Pacific stocks open lower as uncertainty over U.S.-Iran peace talks dents sentiment
summary: Asia-Pacific markets opened mixed Tuesday as investors reacted to renewed uncertainty surrounding U.S.-Iran peace negotiations. Geopolitical concerns weighed on regional market sentiment.
content: Asia-Pacific markets open mixed on Tuesday as investors weighed renewed uncertainty over U.S.-Iran peace negotiations.

zh.title: 随着美伊和平谈判不确定性打击市场情绪，亚太股市低开
zh.summary: 亚太市场周二开盘不一，投资者对美伊和平谈判重新出现的不确定性做出反应。地缘政治担忧对地区市场情绪造成了压力。

title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: Tech stocks led a market rally that lifted the S&P 500 to a new all-time high on Monday, despite headwinds from rising oil prices. The index closed at a record level, signaling sustained investor appetite for equities.
content: A rally in tech stocks helped the market overcome the drag of higher oil prices and lifted the S&P 500 to a new all-time high and a closing record Monday.

zh.title: 周二的大事件：下一个交易时段可能推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 科技股引领了市场反弹，尽管受到油价上升的阻力，但将标普500指数推升至新的历史高点。该指数以纪录水平收盘，表明投资者对股票的持续需求。
